---
title: "Trigonometry & Geometry -- Exercises"
exercise-blank-pages: true
exercise-show-sections: true
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    papersize: a4
    include-before-body:
      - path: ../../shared/styles/exercises.typ
filters:
  - ../../shared/filters/extract-exercises.lua
---

```{=typst}
#import "../../shared/styles/shared.typ": *
#import "../../shared/styles/exercises.typ": *
#setup-exercises("trigonometry", "Trigonometry & Geometry", "Gymnasium -- Mathematics", landscape: true)
#let p = get-palette("trigonometry")
```

{{< include lecture.qmd >}}
